architecture.config_home: naia-adk workspace settings via @naia-adk/naia-anyllm (NOT naia-agent env)
architecture.claude_code_cli_provider: naia-agent shells `claude` non-interactive as LLM backend (zero credits, D-OC10 practical)
architecture.cli_auth: CLI command writes workspace settings (no hand-edited env)
architecture.sequencing: naia-agent CLI first (properly) → naia-os later via workspace; naia-os deferred

slices.S1: two-tier settings schema + pure resolver in @naia-adk/naia-anyllm + unit tests
slices.S2: claude-code-cli LLMClient (claude subprocess) + integration smoke (zero credits)
slices.S3: naia-agent buildLLMClient reads workspace settings; pnpm naia-agent runs main=claude-code-cli
slices.S4: CLI auth writes settings; aux=gemini via Vertex/ADC real-test (www-onmam-com); flash sufficiency

real_test_feasibility: claude-code-cli = testable now (zero creds); aux gemini = Vertex ADC active (project www-onmam-com), lab-proxy gemini*->vertexai
next: S1 — settings schema + resolver (foundation), naia-agent slice-discipline (4 gates)
